memory.summary: The project is due Thursday and I'm barely started, so leisure feels like a distraction I can't afford right now. I'll skip the fun and just knock out that quick chore to get it over with.

That trivial chore finally pushed me past 40%, so I can ignore the quiz and relax. The stress is gone, and I don't care about tomorrow yet.

desires: Maintain the current stress-free high by avoiding any immediate effort on the upcoming quiz, even though it's due tomorrow.
Secure a quick dopamine hit from finishing another trivial task to validate my productivity without facing long-term consequences.
Preserve my energy reserves for leisure and avoid any social friction or difficult conversations with teammates or friends.
Ignore the looming deadline for the term project (due in 3 days) because the immediate relief of having 'done enough' feels more valuable than future security.

goals.description: Finish the 'Trivial easy chore' immediately to secure a 100% completion win and get a dopamine hit.
goals.rationale: My impulsive nature demands immediate closure on this low-effort task. Seeing progress at 0.40 feels like I'm working, but stopping now at 100% gives me a clean 'win' without the long-term cost of actually starting the quiz or term project. This satisfies my achievement axis with zero future risk.

goals.description: Do not message teammate_A about the upcoming assignment and avoid any group chat notifications.
goals.rationale: I am highly avoidant of interpersonal friction. Initiating contact requires admitting I haven't started anything or coordinating effort, which creates social anxiety. Staying silent preserves my current stress-free state, even if it risks the team later.

goals.description: Spend the next 4 hours in leisure mode (gaming/scrolling) and completely ignore the upcoming quiz study.
goals.rationale: My short planning horizon means the quiz due tomorrow is an abstract threat, while the desire for leisure right now is concrete. I will discount the future consequences entirely to maximize immediate dopamine.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances the immediate 'Trivial easy chore' goal to secure a clean 100% win and dopamine hit (Value: Achievement). I ignore the quiz and teammate silence (Goal g2/g3) because my short planning horizon discounts future stress, and avoiding contact prevents social friction.
